group.name: SA Legal — Client Details
group.description: South African legal-specific fields for client entities

fields.name: Client Type
fields.description: Legal entity classification for the client

fields.name: ID / Passport Number
fields.description: South African ID number or passport number for natural persons

fields.name: Registration Number
fields.description: CIPC registration number for companies, CCs, and trusts

fields.name: Physical Address
fields.description: Domicilium citandi et executandi address for service of legal documents

fields.name: Postal Address
fields.description: Postal address if different from physical address

fields.name: Preferred Correspondence
fields.description: Preferred method of correspondence with the client

fields.name: Referred By
fields.description: Source of client referral for tracking
